channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 17.5%.

item.title: FT UK Politics: Ministers must make fresh push for welfare reform says UK government adviser
item.description: Ministers must make fresh push for welfare reform says UK government adviser

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Milburn says migrants not to blame for Neets crisis but falling immigration creates ‘opportunity’ – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Andy Burnham backs proportional representation for Westminster with a Labour manifesto commitment if he becomes leader. He also says he would work with the Greens. My interview for @theobserveruk.bsky.social Walk obse...
